last_substantive_baseline.title: Decouple live report publication from collector compute
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline proves a decoupled report-publication design and planner exist in the repository. It does not prove current Azure state, successful publication, or frontend ingestion.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #37 merge commit observed before the read-only planner-promotion branch was opened
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is time-bounded external evidence, not a self-updating claim. Resolve current head, pull requests, and CI from live GitHub whenever the file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: Azure IaC MSP Lab — bounded read-only Azure planning promotion explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed'
authored_change.scope: Promote only the existing-collector report-publication planner into a manually dispatched GitHub Actions workflow. The workflow may authenticate through the protected azure-lab environment and perform Azure reads, ARM validation, and What-If only. No deployment, RBAC mutation, report publication, frontend endpoint change, collector compute change, budget, alert, or Azure resource mutation is permitted.
verification_criteria: workflow is manual-only, protected by azure-lab, pinned to an exact reviewed commit, and requires exact typed confirmation
workflow authenticates with OIDC only after static read-only tests pass
workflow calls only the existing read-only planner and cannot deploy, create or delete RBAC, run guest commands, or mutate Azure resources
planning artifacts capture Azure context, resource group, collector identity, Storage and RBAC inventory, ARM validation, exact What-If, cost boundary, and a digest manifest
bounded authority grant permits Azure authentication and dispatch for this planner only while keeping Azure mutations false
workflow-observability validation and all exact-head CI jobs pass
final diff remains limited to the six declared paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep the pull request draft, inspect the exact failing CI job, patch only the declared paths, and obtain fresh exact-head CI. Do not weaken confirmation, protected-environment, exact-commit, artifact, cost-boundary, or no-mutation controls.
authored_change.rollback: Close the pull request without merge or revert its repository-only commits. If already merged, disable or remove only the read-only planner workflow through a reviewed revert. No Azure rollback applies unless a separately dispatched planning run produced evidence; that run performs no Azure mutation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction 'Proceed' after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes authentication and dispatch only for current-state inventory, ARM validation, and What-If. It does not authorize deployment, role changes, report publication, endpoint configuration, guest commands, or any Azure resource mutation.

completed_increments.title: Add fail-closed collector recovery evidence schemas
Reconcile PR34 merge and project state
Decouple live report publication from collector compute

resolved_repository_items.title: Define collector recovery evidence schemas
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

resolved_repository_items.title: Repair collector recovery evidence review findings
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This remains historical evidence until the promoted existing-collector report-publication planner is merged and dispatched. It does not prove current tenant, subscription, resources, RBAC, guest health, pricing, quota, report Storage, endpoint, or browser state.

pr37_publication_design.claim_boundary: Repository-design and read-only planning-path acceptance only; not Azure execution, publication, or frontend live-data proof.

authority_defaults.rule: Defaults remain fail-closed. A validated bounded_authority_grants entry may authorize a narrowly scoped exception; no grant may imply Azure mutation authority unless explicitly recorded.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live open pull requests at read time.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
